description: Run the learning pipeline on a completed session: extract patterns, analyze prompt effectiveness of involved agents and seed rules, and update seeds accordingly.

optional.session_id: UUID of the session to analyze. Default: most recent session for the current project.
optional.project_path: Absolute path to the project directory. Default: current working directory.
optional.workflow: Workflow name to file rules under. Default: reads ## Workflow: from CLAUDE.md.
optional.dry_run: boolean — show analysis without writing any rules (default: false)
optional.step: all | patterns | effectiveness — which part of the pipeline to run (default: all)

output.new_rules: number of new rules added (or staged in pending/)
output.pending_review: number of rules queued in seeds/workflows/{workflow}/pending/
output.rules_used_useful: number of seed rules rated used_useful
output.rules_ignored: number of seed rules rated ignored
output.contradictions: number of contradicting rules/prompt sections found
output.report: human-readable summary of what was learned
